diagram_title: C Root Daemon Splice Proxy Hardening — IDEF0

activities.title: Accept 與 Buffer HTTP 請求
activities.description: Non-blocking accept, 依-connection read buffer, accumulate 直到 完成 HTTP header.

decomposition.title: Accept Connection
decomposition.description: accept4() 使用 SOCK CLOEXEC, set non-blocking, allocate 待處理請求, 註冊 到 epoll.

decomposition.title: Accumulate HTTP Data
decomposition.description: 在 EPOLLIN 供 待處理 fd, read available 位元組 進入 依-connection buffer 直到 \r\n\r\n detected.

decomposition.title: Enforce 請求 Limits
decomposition.description: Reject oversized (>8KB header) 或 timed-out (>30s) requests 使用 400/408 回應.

activities.title: 驗證 使用者
activities.description: PAM 驗證 在 dedicated thread, JWT signing, 登入 速率限制ing.

decomposition.title: Check Rate Limit
decomposition.description: 依-IP sliding window: >5 failures 在 60s → 429 不 entering PAM.

decomposition.title: 啟動 驗證 Thread
decomposition.description: pthread 供 PAM 驗證 + pamacctmgmt. Communicates 結果 透過 eventfd/pipe.

decomposition.title: Issue JWT cookie
decomposition.description: 在 PAM success, sign JWT 使用 檔案-backed secret (sub + exp), set http僅 cookie.

activities.title: Validate 身分 與 路由
activities.description: Decode JWT claims, verify sub + exp, 解析 目標 daemon 由 身分.

decomposition.title: Decode 與 Verify JWT
decomposition.description: Base64url decode payload, validate sub + exp, HMAC signature check 使用 檔案-backed secret.

decomposition.title: 解析 使用者 身分
decomposition.description: sub → getpwnam() → uid. Reject if 使用者 不 found.

decomposition.title: Select 目標 Daemon
decomposition.description: find或createdaemon(username) → 註冊表 lookup 由 uid → adopt 或 啟動.

activities.title: Manage Daemon Lifecycle
activities.description: Discovery-first adopt, fork+setuid 啟動, readiness wait, stale cleanup.

decomposition.title: Try Adopt 來自 Discovery
decomposition.description: Read daemon.js在, verify PID alive, 探測 socket connectable. Adopt 或 cleanup stale 狀態.

decomposition.title: 啟動 依-使用者 Daemon
decomposition.description: fork → initgroups → setgid → setuid → execvp(opencode serve --unix-socket). 無 sh -c.

decomposition.title: Wait 供 Readiness
decomposition.description: Poll socket existence + connectability within timeout. Handle child exit before readiness.

decomposition.title: Detect Runtime 路徑
decomposition.description: Check /執行/使用者/<uid>/ → $XDG RUNTIME DIR → /tmp/opencode-<uid>/. 記錄 selected 路徑.

activities.title: Establish 與 執行 Splice Proxy
activities.description: Connect 到 daemon Unix socket, create pipe pairs, 註冊 到 epoll 使用 tagged 上下文, splice bidirectionally.

decomposition.title: Connect 與 Allocate
decomposition.description: connectunix(socket路徑), alloc Connection slot, create pipe pairs, set non-blocking.

decomposition.title: 註冊 使用 Tagged 上下文
decomposition.description: Create EpollCtx 供 clientfd (SPLICE CLIENT) 與 daemonfd (SPLICE DAEMON), 註冊 到 epoll.

decomposition.title: Forward Initial 請求
decomposition.description: Send buffered HTTP 請求 位元組 到 daemonfd.

decomposition.title: 執行 Directional Splice
decomposition.description: 在 EPOLLIN: check EpollCtx.type → splice 僅 在 triggered direction. 在 HUP/ERR: close.

activities.title: Manage Connection Lifecycle
activities.description: Proper cleanup: EPOLL CTL DEL, close fds, release slot, decrement counter, guard 在-flight 事件.

decomposition.title: Deregister 來自 epoll
decomposition.description: EPOLL CTL DEL 供 both clientfd 與 daemonfd before closing.

decomposition.title: Close 與 Release
decomposition.description: Close all fds (client, daemon, pipe pairs), release connection slot, decrement gnconns.

decomposition.title: Guard 在-Flight 事件
decomposition.description: Set closed flag 在 Connection. Same-round epoll 事件 check flag 與 skip if set.

arrows.label: 完成 HTTP 登入 請求
完成 HTTP 請求 使用 JWT cookie
PAM Service 與 JWT Secret 檔案
Discovery 檔案 與 Daemon 註冊表
就緒 Daemon Socket 路徑
